channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Jessica Alba Says She's All About 'Forward Momentum' 4 Days After Ex Cash Warren Filed to Finalize Their Divorce
item.description: Alba is now dating Marvel actor Danny Ramirez

item.title: Shaquille O’Neal Is Taking Over the Winter Olympics — and Brought 20 Pairs of Underwear to Milan in Preparation (Exclusive)
item.description: O'Neal packed a variety of activities into his first two days in Milan, Italy during the 2026 Winter Olympics

item.title: Krys Marshall Welcomes Baby No. 2 with Husband Ted Dolan (Exclusive)
item.description: The actress is already a mom to one son, whom she welcomed in June 2023

item.title: All About JFK Jr. and Daryl Hannah's 5-Year Relationship
item.description: JFK Jr. and Daryl Hannah split in 1994 after dating for more than five years

item.title: All About Maya Hawke's Famous Parents, Dad Ethan Hawke and Mom Uma Thurman
item.description: Maya Hawke has followed in parents Ethan Hawke and Uma Thurman's acting footsteps

item.title: Jason Oppenheim & Jessica Vargas Breakup Was Not About Having Kids
item.description: While "Selling Sunset" star Jason Oppenheim and Jessica Vargas are no longer together, they did NOT break up over a disagreement about starting a fami...

item.title: Hilary Duff Says New Album Explores Complicated Family Life Amid Haylie Beef
item.description: Hilary Duff says her new album is her finally being ready to share who she is ... including her "very complicated" family dynamic and beef with her si...

item.title: 'TMZ After Dark' Valentine's Day Tour Hosted by 'Love Island's Jaden & Vanna
item.description: For Valentine’s Day this year, trust TMZ to ditch the candlelit clichés to host a full-blown love fest on our "TMZ After Dark" tour ... with "Love Isl...

item.title: Saddled Up Stars to Kick Off the Year of the Fire Horse
item.description: Today is Lunar New Year, and we've got Hollywood's hottest riders to kick off The Year of the Fire Horse 🔥! Unlike the usual Horse, which occurs every...

item.title: Shia LaBeouf and Wife Mia Goth Separated About a Year Ago
item.description: Shia LaBeouf is going through it this week following an alleged drunken fight and arrest in New Orleans -- and that's on top of a split from his wife ...
